response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified scene breaks based on visual changes (talking segments vs performances). 2. Used text overlays during performances to identify song titles and composers ('Nanahoshi Orchestra/Iwamii Riku'). 3. Used the search tool to confirm Japanese titles and find lyrics. 4. Constructed the final JSON with full lyrics, timestamps, and metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a variety show segment with VTubers, including two vocal performances of songs by Nanahoshi Orchestra/Iwamii Riku.

scenes.description: Introductory talk in a classroom setting with several VTuber characters present.
Performers sing and dance to 'Chu-Chu-Chu-Chukigedo'. Text on screen indicates credits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
特に面白い話もないよ
自嘲して分を知った顔をしている
喋りすぎた飲み会の内容
思い出して恥ずかしくなる
「大人になるってそういう事だから」
街灯に当たり死んでいく羽虫の様に
僕は真っ当に生きて そのためにも今は走れよ
前だけ向いて
「滑稽だ」という声でさえ推進力にして

まともかどうかは数字で分かる
世の中のスタンダードに甘んじて頷く
金銭が正義なら 善意なんかは悪そのものだな
んなわけねぇから
その分かったような口を塞いでくれないか？
「僕の代わりはいくらでもいるよ」
「誰にだって出来る人生だ」
誰かじゃなくてお前がやんだよ
出来るもんならやってみろよ
その「大したことのない」毎日を
今を全力でやってみせるんだよ

酩酊で闇に消えてゆくあの子のように
僕は真っ当に生きて 言葉はいらないただ走れよ
靴擦り減らして
「滑稽だ」と言われてこそ
そこがスタートライン
しゅっぱつ！

意気込んで1歩目から躓いちまう
そんなぶきっちょな君が好きだよ
へっちゃらさ！と強がる時の声が
いつもより少し頼もしい
もうこんな時間！
君も時間もずんずん進む
いけるかい？
めいっぱい助走をつけて
大丈夫、君なら心配ないぜ
思い切って踏み出してみせて
ほんとは全部知りたいけど
何もかもは聞かないさ
今日も楽しかったんならそれでいい
どこにいても 何も成し遂げなくとも
出発地点はここだよ いつまでも
もうこんな時間！
忘れもんはない？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
There's nothing especially interesting
Self-deprecating, I learned to know my place
Content of the drinking party where I talked too much
I remember it and get embarrassed
'That's what it means to be an adult'
Like a winged insect dying against a streetlamp
I live properly, so run for that sake too
Look only forward
Using even the voice that says 'ridiculous' as propulsion

[Chorus]
It's okay whether it's normal or not, you can tell by the numbers
Nodding in resignation to the world's standard
If money is justice, then goodwill itself is evil
That's not true, so won't you shut that mouth that thinks it knows everything?
'There are plenty of people to take my place'
'It's a life that anyone can do'
It's not someone else, it's you who does it
If you can do it, try doing it
Do that 'nothing special' daily life
And try doing it now with all your might

[Verse 2]
Like that child who disappears into darkness through intoxication
I live properly, words are unnecessary, just run
Wear out your shoes
Being told it's 'ridiculous', that's the starting line
Departure!

[Chorus]
Stumbling from the very first step of enthusiasm
I like you, who are that clumsy
It's okay! Your voice when you act tough
Is a little more reliable than usual
Oh, such a time!
Both you and time are moving forward
Can you do it?
With a full run-up
Don't worry, if it's you, there's no need to worry
Try taking the plunge
Actually I want to know everything
But I won't ask for absolutely everything
If today was fun, then that's fine
Wherever you are, even if you don't accomplish anything
This is the starting point, always
Oh, such a time!
Did I forget anything?

scenes.description: A variety show conversation segment where VTubers discuss preferences.
Laplus Darknesss sings 'Delihel Yondara Kimi ga Kita'. Credits shown on screen.
scenes.song_title: デリヘル呼んだら君が来た

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
So, thinking 'let's take a little break'
I called the number on the flyer
Since there happened to be a girl I really liked right away
I chose the one with the big chest

[Chorus]
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!

[Verse 2]
So, let's take a little break
Let's do that for now, shall we?
I called the number on the flyer

[Bridge]
I happened to be in the mood
It was a perfect match

[Chorus]
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!
I called the delivery health service and you came
No, no, thank you!

[Outro]
I'm so glad you came,
I really am.
Let's relax.
Thank you!
